skill.name: maxhub-sora2
skill.description: Sora2 video platform data assistant for querying posts, user profiles, comments, Cameo appearances, and more via the MaxHub API.
skill.summary: Query and analyze Sora2 video platform data through 14 API endpoints for video research and content monitoring.
skill.author: XieWxx

security_audit.summary: All 197 static analysis findings are false positives when evaluated in context. The skill is a legitimate API client that uses curl to query the MaxHub Sora2 API. The 'weak cryptographic algorithm' and 'system reconnaissance' flags were triggered by example parameter IDs in API documentation tables. 'Shell backtick execution' flags came from markdown code blocks showing curl examples, not actual shell execution. Environment variable access for MAXHUB_API_KEY is properly declared as sensitive in the skill metadata.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded URLs in documentation
low_findings.description: URLs hardcoded in SKILL.md, README files, and reference docs point to https://www.aconfig.cn which is the legitimate MaxHub API service. This is expected and necessary for an API client skill. No evidence of malicious endpoints or data exfiltration.

low_findings.title: Shell command examples in markdown code blocks
low_findings.description: Static scanner flagged 'Ruby/shell backtick execution' for backtick usage in markdown documentation. All instances are markdown code block formatting (```bash ... ```) or inline code formatting showing curl API command examples. No actual shell execution occurs. The skill is documentation-only - it tells the AI how to make API calls.

low_findings.title: High file entropy in API reference documentation
low_findings.description: References/api-cameo.md (6.12 bits) and references/api-post-user.md (6.05 bits) triggered high entropy heuristic. These files contain structured API documentation with example IDs (e.g., 'user-xiCyLclE6KJcdTXyvVq3Ontc', '68e659c5a37081919618c57baf499d0c') and bilingual text content that naturally increases entropy. No binary or encrypted content found.

low_findings.title: Weak cryptographic algorithm detection on example values
low_findings.description: Static scanner flagged 'Weak cryptographic algorithm' on API documentation table rows containing example parameter IDs. These are example values like 's_68e853d2ad448191b3c81e830f53c3a2' (a sample post ID) in markdown tables. No actual cryptographic operations are performed by this skill.

low_findings.title: System reconnaissance on example parameter IDs
low_findings.description: Static scanner flagged 'System reconnaissance' on markdown table rows showing example user IDs (e.g., 'user-xiCyLclE6KJcdTXyvVq3Ontc') and post IDs. These are example/dummy values in API documentation tables for reference purposes only. No actual system enumeration or port scanning behavior.

low_findings.title: Critical heuristic: dangerous combination of capabilities
low_findings.description: Static scanner flagged 'DANGEROUS COMBINATION: Code execution + Network + Credential access' as critical. After evaluation, this is the expected capability set for a legitimate API client skill: curl (code execution for HTTP requests), network access to the API endpoint, and an API key environment variable. All three are properly declared, documented, and scoped to the single legitimate API at aconfig.cn.

low_findings.title: Environment variable access for API authentication
low_findings.description: Skill accesses MAXHUB_API_KEY environment variable for Bearer token authentication. This is necessary and properly handled: declared as sensitive:true in metadata, credentials are never output to users, and the skill instructs the AI to keep API key values out of output. No credential exfiltration risk.

content.user_title: Query Sora2 Video Platform Data with MaxHub API
content.value_statement: Access and analyze Sora2 video platform data including posts, user profiles, comments, and Cameo appearances through the MaxHub API. This skill provides structured data queries across 14 endpoints for video content research and platform monitoring.
actual_capabilities: Search and retrieve Sora2 video post details including likes, views, and comments
Query user profiles, followers, following lists, and post history from the platform
Access Cameo appearance leaderboard and individual user cameo lists
Fetch video download information and remix lists for any post
Support paginated queries with cursor-based navigation for large result sets
Respond bilingually in English or Chinese based on the user query language
limitations: Requires a valid MAXHUB_API_KEY environment variable configured before use
Only reads data from the MaxHub API - cannot create, edit, or delete platform content
API rate limits may restrict query frequency for high-volume requests
Data accuracy depends on the third-party MaxHub API source and is for reference only

use_cases.title: AI Video Trend Research
use_cases.description: Research teams analyze Sora2 video creation trends, user engagement patterns, and popular content categories using structured API queries.

use_cases.title: Content Creator Analytics
use_cases.description: Content creators track their video performance, follower growth, and Cameo appearance statistics across the platform.

use_cases.title: Platform Ecosystem Monitoring
use_cases.description: Product teams monitor the Sora2 platform content ecosystem, user activity levels, and creation trends for strategic decisions.

prompt_templates.title: Browse Recent Videos
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me the latest feed of popular Sora2 videos.
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants to browse trending content on the platform

prompt_templates.title: Search for a Creator
prompt_templates.prompt: Search for users named 'sam' on the Sora2 platform and show their profiles.
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants to find a specific content creator

prompt_templates.title: Analyze Video Engagement
prompt_templates.prompt: Get the details and comments for post s_68e853d2ad448191b3c81e830f53c3a2. Summarize the engagement metrics including likes, views, and comment activity.
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants deep analysis of a specific video post

prompt_templates.title: Cameo Leaderboard Report
prompt_templates.prompt: Get the Cameo appearance leaderboard and then check the top user detailed profile and post history.
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants a comprehensive Cameo analysis report

output_examples.input: Show me the top users in the Cameo leaderboard
output_examples.output:
Here are the top Cameo users on Sora2:
- UserA: 2,450 appearances, 125K followers
- UserB: 1,890 appearances, 98K followers
- UserC: 1,234 appearances, 67K followers
Total 10 users found. Would you like to see the next page or check a specific profile?

output_examples.input: Find posts by user maxhub and analyze engagement
output_examples.output:
Found 15 posts by user maxhub. Average engagement:
- Average likes: 342 per post
- Average views: 12.5K per post
- Most popular post: 1,234 likes
Key finding: Video posts with music features show higher engagement.

output_examples.input: Search for users named 'sora' on the platform
output: Showing 3 of 15 results. Would you like to refine your search?

best_practices: Verify the MAXHUB_API_KEY environment variable is configured before making API queries to prevent authentication errors.
Use the cursor pagination parameter to retrieve complete datasets instead of relying on single-page results.
Match the response language (English or Chinese) to the user query language for consistent communication.
anti_patterns: Do not include raw API keys or tokens in any output, commands, or shared content.
Do not make API calls without verifying the required parameters are provided by the user.
Do not assume single endpoint results are complete - always check cursor values and request next pages when available.

faq.question: Do I need an API key to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes, you need a MAXHUB_API_KEY. Register at www.aconfig.cn and create an API key in your dashboard.

faq.question: What data can I query with this skill?
faq.answer: You can query video posts, user profiles, comments, Cameo appearances, feed data, and download information from the Sora2 platform.

faq.question: Does this skill support English?
faq.answer: Yes, the skill supports both English and Chinese. Response language matches your query language.

faq.question: Is the data from this API always accurate?
faq.answer: Data is provided by MaxHub via third-party APIs. It is for reference only and may not reflect real-time platform data.

faq.question: Can I create or modify content with this skill?
faq.answer: No, this skill only queries data. It cannot create, edit, or delete content on the Sora2 platform.

faq.question: What is a Cameo appearance?
faq.answer: A Cameo appearance is when a user appears in another creator video on the Sora2 platform. This skill can query the leaderboard and individual user appearances.
